SEARCH

Package bupt.ta.service

package bupt.ta.service
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    bupt.ta
    BUPT International School teaching assistant recruitment system.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AdminService
    Shared admin analytics and workload-enforcement logic.
    AdminService.AdminApplicationRow
    Application row on an admin detail view.
    AdminService.ApplicationAlert
    Application data anomaly flagged for admin review.
    AdminService.CapacityAlert
    Job posting that has reached its selection capacity.
    AdminService.DashboardSummary
    Aggregate counts for the admin dashboard.
    AdminService.InterviewNoticeAlert
    Application in interview stage missing expected notice fields.
    AdminService.LimitAlert
    TA who is at or over the configured workload cap.
    AdminService.MODetailReport
    Full admin read-only report for one module organiser.
    AdminService.MOJobDetailRow
    One job row on an MO admin detail view.
    AdminService.MonitoringReport
    Aggregated alerts for the admin monitoring dashboard.
    AdminService.TADetailReport
    Full admin read-only report for one TA.
    AdminService.UserDirectoryReport
    Filtered user list with per-role activity metrics.
    AdminService.UserListRow
    One row in the admin user directory.
    AdminService.WorkloadRow
    TA workload summary for the admin workload page.
    ApplicationTimelineService
    Helper for writing application audit timeline events consistently.
    EmailNotificationService
    Sends emails using SMTP settings from admin settings, system properties or environment variables.
    EmailNotificationService.EmailSettings
    Resolved SMTP and portal settings used to send mail.
    EmailNotificationService.SendResult
    Outcome of a single send attempt.
    EmailOtpService
    Email OTP (one-time password) generation + verification.
    EmailOtpService.OtpRequestResult
    Result of EmailOtpService.requestOtp(bupt.ta.storage.DataStorage, java.lang.String, java.lang.String, bupt.ta.model.AdminSettings).
    EmailOtpService.OtpVerifyResult
    Result of EmailOtpService.verifyOtp(bupt.ta.storage.DataStorage, java.lang.String, java.lang.String, java.lang.String).
    InterviewBookingService
    Coordinates bookable interview slots for applicants and module organisers.
    InterviewBookingService.ActionResult
    Success or failure from a booking action with a user-facing message.
    InterviewBookingService.SlotSummary
    Interview slot with current bookings and remaining capacity.
    NotificationReminderService
    Summarizes unread site notifications and can send reminder emails in batch.
    NotificationReminderService.ReminderPreview
    Counts for the admin unread-reminder preview panel.
    NotificationReminderService.ReminderResult
    Outcome of a batch unread-reminder email run.
    StudentNotificationService
    Creates in-app notifications for TA applicants when application state changes.
